Title: Verify adding a beneficiary successfully
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Add Beneficiary page
Step 2: Enter valid account number "123456789012"
Step 3: Enter valid IFSC code "QRST0001234"
Step 4: Click the "Add Beneficiary" button
Step 5: Observe success confirmation message
Expected_Result: Beneficiary is added and a success message is displayed

Title: Verify instant fund transfer succeeds for valid beneficiary within limit
Precondition: User is logged in and has at least one registered beneficiary
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Transfer page
Step 2: Select a registered beneficiary
Step 3: Enter transfer amount "5000"
Step 4: Click "Proceed"
Step 5: Enter received OTP "123456" and submit
Step 6: Confirm transaction
Expected_Result: Transfer is completed, confirmation message displayed, and transaction appears in history

Title: Verify OTP verification flow succeeds and transaction is confirmed
Precondition: User initiates a transfer for a registered beneficiary
Steps:
Step 1: Initiate transfer and click "Proceed"
Step 2: Receive OTP on registered mobile number
Step 3: Enter correct OTP "654321"
Step 4: Submit OTP
Step 5: Observe transaction confirmation
Expected_Result: OTP is accepted and transaction is marked successful

Title: Verify Add Beneficiary API returns error for invalid account number
Steps:
Step 1: Send POST request to /api/beneficiaries with payload {"accountNumber":"abc123","ifsc":"QRST0001234"}
Step 2: Capture response status code and body
Step 3: Verify status code is 400
Step 4: Verify error message indicates invalid account number
Expected_Result: API responds with 400 Bad Request and appropriate validation error

Title: Verify transfer fails when OTP is entered incorrectly three times
Precondition: User has initiated a transfer and OTP is pending
Steps:
Step 1: Enter incorrect OTP "111111" and submit
Step 2: Observe error message
Step 3: Enter another incorrect OTP "222222" and submit
Step 4: Observe error message
Step 5: Enter third incorrect OTP "333333" and submit
Step 6: Verify transaction is cancelled after three failed attempts
Expected_Result: Transaction is cancelled and user receives a failure message after third attempt

Title: Verify transfer at maximum limit succeeds
Precondition: User is logged in with sufficient balance
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Transfer page
Step 2: Select a registered beneficiary
Step 3: Enter transfer amount "100000" (maximum allowed)
Step 4: Click "Proceed"
Step 5: Enter valid OTP "987654" and submit
Step 6: Confirm transaction
Expected_Result: Transfer of ₹100,000 is processed successfully and appears in transaction history

Title: Verify beneficiary addition is blocked when user session has expired
Precondition: User logs in, then session expires due to timeout
Steps:
Step 1: Attempt to navigate to the Add Beneficiary page after session expiration
Step 2: Fill in valid account number "123456789012" and IFSC "MNOP0123456"
Step 3: Click the "Add Beneficiary" button
Step 4: Observe system response
Expected_Result: System redirects to login page or shows "Session expired" message; beneficiary is not added

Title: Verify Add Beneficiary API returns success for valid payload
Steps:
Step 1: Send POST request to /api/beneficiaries with payload {"accountNumber":"123456789012","ifsc":"QRST0001234"}
Step 2: Capture response status code and body
Step 3: Verify status code is 201
Step 4: Verify response body contains success message
Expected_Result: API responds with 201 Created and a success confirmation

Title: Verify user can add beneficiary via UI with valid details
Precondition: User is logged into the mobile banking app
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to the Add Beneficiary page
Step 2: Enter Account Number "123456789012"
Step 3: Enter IFSC Code "MNOP0123456"
Step 4: Enter Beneficiary Name "John Doe"
Step 5: Click the "Add Beneficiary" button
Step 6: Verify success toast/message is displayed
Expected_Result: Beneficiary is added and appears in the beneficiary list

Title: Verify transferring money within allowed limits with correct OTP
Precondition: User is logged in, beneficiary exists, and on Transfer Money page
Steps:
Step 1: Select the previously added beneficiary
Step 2: Enter transfer amount of 5000
Step 3: Click 'Proceed' to trigger OTP
Step 4: Enter the correct OTP received (123456)
Step 5: Click 'Confirm Transfer'
Step 6: Verify confirmation message is shown
Expected_Result: Transfer is completed successfully and confirmation message is displayed

Title: Verify success message is displayed after a completed transfer
Precondition: User has just completed a successful transfer
Steps:
Step 1: Observe the UI after confirming the transfer
Step 2: Locate the notification area
Step 3: Read the displayed message
Expected_Result: Message 'Transfer successful' (or equivalent) is shown to the user

Title: Verify error when adding beneficiary with invalid account number format
Precondition: User is logged in and on Add Beneficiary page
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Add Beneficiary screen
Step 2: Enter an invalid account number (ABC123)
Step 3: Enter a valid IFSC code (ABCD0123456)
Step 4: Click the 'Add Beneficiary' button
Step 5: Observe validation error
Expected_Result: System shows validation error stating account number must be numeric and 10‑16 digits

Title: Verify error when transfer amount exceeds the maximum limit
Precondition: User is logged in, beneficiary exists, and on Transfer Money page
Steps:
Step 1: Select a beneficiary
Step 2: Enter transfer amount of 150000 (exceeds ₹1,00,000 limit)
Step 3: Click 'Proceed'
Step 4: Observe validation response
Expected_Result: System blocks the transfer and displays an error about exceeding the allowed limit

Title: Verify transfer of the minimum allowed amount succeeds
Precondition: User is logged in, beneficiary exists, and on Transfer Money page
Steps:
Step 1: Select the beneficiary
Step 2: Enter the minimum transfer amount of 1
Step 3: Click 'Proceed' and enter correct OTP (123456)
Step 4: Click 'Confirm Transfer'
Step 5: Verify success notification
Expected_Result: Transfer of ₹1 is processed successfully and confirmation message appears

Title: Verify OTP verification blocks transfer when OTP is incorrect
Precondition: User is logged in, beneficiary exists, and on Transfer Money page
Steps:
Step 1: Select the beneficiary
Step 2: Enter a valid transfer amount (5000)
Step 3: Click 'Proceed' to request OTP
Step 4: Enter an incorrect OTP (000000)
Step 5: Click 'Confirm Transfer'
Step 6: Observe error message
Expected_Result: Transfer is not completed and an error message indicating invalid OTP is displayed

Title: Verify transaction history API returns the recent transfer record
Precondition: A successful transfer has been made earlier in the session
Steps:
Step 1: Send GET request to /api/transactions?userId=USER123
Step 2: Receive JSON response
Step 3: Validate that the latest entry matches the recent transfer details (amount, beneficiary, status)
Expected_Result: API returns a list containing the newly created transaction with correct details and status 'Success'
